response.justification: Sarah is an exceptional candidate who vastly exceeds the 6+ years of experience requirement. She has deep expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and the secondary stack (Java). Crucially, she possesses recent, hands-on experience with AI agent development and MCP frameworks, paired with a robust background in testing, cloud infrastructure, and architecture.
strengths: Extensive experience with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies like Java.
Recent, direct experience building AI agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows.
Strong engineering culture advocate with deep expertise in TDD, CI/CD, and creating open-source testing tools.
concerns: Missing explicit experience with Nest.js and Vitest, though her general Node.js and testing expertise easily mitigates this.
Currently holds a Staff Engineer title, which might indicate a Senior role could be a step down in scope or compensation expectations.
Has a long history of concurrent side projects and founding roles (e.g., GISCollective) which might compete for her time.
